Test info config synchronization
Utility)
testbasec
TestInfoConfigSyncc
superr
myinitZ
_start_ovsZ
_start_netagent)
self
	__class__
@/usr/lib/python3.9/site-packages/na_tests/ft/test_info_config.pyr
TestInfoConfigSync.myinitc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
na-ctl add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface br0 other_config:fake=fake"
ovs-vsctl set Interface br0 other_config:fake=fake
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl dump > add_br_dump.txt
grep 'interface: br0: br=br0,ofport=65534,tag=0,other_cfg' add_br_dump.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
test_dirTr
z,test add bridge failed: shell return code:%d
cmd_execute
formatZ	_test_dirZ
assertEqual
retr
test_add_bridge
z"TestInfoConfigSync.test_add_bridgec
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy 
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ovs-vsctl del-br br0
na-ctl dump > del_port_dump.txt  # TODO: bad
grep 'interface: p1: br=br0,ofport=1,tag=0,other_cfg=' del_port_dump.txt
ret=$?
# can't grepped wanted text here
if test $ret -eq 0; then 
    exit 2
z,test del bridge failed: shell return code:%dr
test_del_bridge!
z"TestInfoConfigSync.test_del_bridgec
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy 
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
na-ctl --retry=-1 add-listen --id=1 --event="set Interface p1 other_config:fake=fake"
ovs-vsctl set Interface p1 other_config:fake=fake
na-ctl wait --id=1
na-ctl dump > add_port_dump.txt
grep 'interface: p1: br=br0,ofport=1,tag=0,other_cfg=' add_port_dump.txt
if test $? -ne 0; then
    exit 2
z*test add port failed: shell return code:%dr
test_add_port3
z TestInfoConfigSync.test_add_portc
cd {test_dir}
ovs-vsctl add-br br0 -- set bridge br0 fail-mode=standalone --     add-port br0 p1 -- set interface p1 ofport_request=1 type=dummy 
ovs-ofctl mod-port br0 br0 noforward
ovs-vsctl del-port br0 p1
na-ctl dump > del_port_dump.txt
grep 'interface: p1: br=br0,ofport=1,tag=0,other_cfg=' del_port_dump.txt
if test $? -eq 0; then  # can't grepped wanted text here
    exit 2
z*test del port failed: shell return code:%dr
test_del_portE
z TestInfoConfigSync.test_del_port)
